info.title: dotnet-document
info.description: A tool for auto-generating XML documentation for you C# code, Difference from p1va forked tmonck version is pascal case yaml and bugfix on ShouldDocument method. Default options has only public modifier.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: SymbolExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ModelBindingCommandHandler.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

commands.name: apply
commands.description: Applies documentation on *.cs files in the [folder/solution/project].

options.name: config
options.description: Set the config file path used to define documentation templates.

options.name: verbosity
options.description: (Default: n) Set the verbosity level. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed], and diag[nostic]

options.name: dry-run
options.description: Documents files without saving changes to disk. Terminates with a non-zero exit code if any files were documented.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: The path to a [folder/solution/project] to operate on. If a file is not specified, the command will search the current directory

options.name: config
options.description: Set the config file path used to define documentation templates.
